div.p: Discover the main features of our wonderful product

i.class: fa fa-cubes fa-2x mb-3 bg-transparent border rounded

div.p: Tell what's the value for the customer for this feature.

i.class: fa fa-envelope-o fa-2x mb-3 bg-transparent border rounded

div.p: Write what the customer would like to know, not what you want to show.

i.class: fa fa-comment-o fa-2x mb-3 bg-transparent border rounded

div.p: A small explanation of this great feature, in clear words.

i.class: fa fa-heart-o fa-2x mb-3 bg-transparent border rounded

div.p: A small explanation of this great feature, in clear words.

i.class: fa fa-star-o fa-2x mb-3 bg-transparent border rounded

div.p: Tell what's the value for the customer for this feature.

i.class: fa fa-folder-o fa-2x mb-3 bg-transparent border rounded

div.p: Write what the customer would like to know, not what you want to show.
